testcase.name: testGetSecurityQuestions

2026-03-06T04:44:02.732+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.revature.passwordmanager.SecurityQuestionIntegrationTest]: SecurityQuestionIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-06T04:44:02.739+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.revature.passwordmanager.PasswordManagerApplication for test class com.revature.passwordmanager.SecurityQuestionIntegrationTest 2026-03-06T04:44:02.746+05:30 INFO 32332 --- [ main] o.s.b.d.r.RestartApplicationListener : Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

cascade 2026-03-06T04:44:05.161+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists user_settings cascade 2026-03-06T04:44:05.161+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists users cascade 2026-03-06T04:44:05.161+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists vault_entries cascade 2026-03-06T04:44:05.162+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : drop table if exists vault_snapshots cascade 2026-03-06T04:44:05.162+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table audit_logs (id bigint generated by default as identity, timestamp timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint not null, ip_address varchar(45), action VARCHAR(50) not null check (action in ('LOGIN','LOGIN_FAILED','LOGOUT','ENTRY_CREATED','ENTRY_UPDATED','ENTRY_DELETED','PASSWORD_VIEWED','ENTRY_RESTORED','VAULT_EXPORTED','DASHBOARD_VIEWED','BREACH_SCAN_RUN','BREACH_DETECTED','BREACH_RESOLVED','SHARE_CREATED','SHARE_ACCESSED','SHARE_REVOKED','TIMELINE_VIEWED')), details varchar(500), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.166+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table backup_codes (two_factor_auth_id bigint not null, code varchar(255)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.170+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table backup_exports (entry_count integer, is_encrypted boolean, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, export_format varchar(20) not null check (export_format in ('JSON','CSV','XML')), file_name varchar(200) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.172+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table categories (is_default boolean, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint, icon varchar(50), name varchar(100) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.174+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table folders (created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_folder_id bigint, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.177+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table login_attempts (risk_score integer, successful boolean not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, timestamp timestamp(6) not null, user_id bigint, ip_address varchar(45), failure_reason varchar(200), location varchar(200), device_info varchar(500), username_attempted varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.179+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table notifications (is_read boolean, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, notification_type varchar(50) not null check (notification_type in ('PASSWORD_EXPIRY','SECURITY_ALERT','BACKUP_REMINDER','SYSTEM_UPDATE','BREACH_DETECTED','ACCOUNT_ACTIVITY')), title varchar(200) not null, message varchar(1000) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.183+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table otp_tokens (is_used boolean not null, expiry_date timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, token varchar(255) not null, token_type varchar(255), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.185+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table password_analysis (is_reused boolean, strength_score integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, last_analyzed timestamp(6) not null, vault_entry_id bigint not null unique, issues varchar(1000), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.189+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table recovery_codes (is_used boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, code_hash varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.192+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table secure_shares (is_revoked boolean not null, max_views integer not null, view_count integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, owner_id bigint not null, vault_entry_id bigint not null, permission varchar(30) not null check (permission in ('VIEW_ONCE','VIEW_MULTIPLE','TEMPORARY_ACCESS')), encrypted_password TEXT not null, encryption_iv varchar(255), recipient_email varchar(255), share_token varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.197+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table security_alerts (is_read boolean, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, severity varchar(20) not null check (severity in ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL')), alert_type varchar(50) not null check (alert_type in ('NEW_DEVICE_LOGIN','NEW_LOCATION_LOGIN','MULTIPLE_FAILED_LOGINS','PASSWORD_CHANGED','TWO_FA_ENABLED','TWO_FA_DISABLED','ACCOUNT_LOCKED','SENSITIVE_ACCESS','PASSWORD_BREACHED','BREACH_SCAN_COMPLETE')), title varchar(200) not null, message varchar(1000) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.203+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table security_metrics_history (fair_passwords_count integer, old_passwords_count integer, overall_score integer, reused_passwords_count integer, strong_passwords_count integer, total_passwords_count integer, weak_passwords_count integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, recorded_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.206+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table security_questions (id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, answer_hash varchar(255) not null, question_text varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.210+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table two_factor_auth (is_enabled boolean not null, created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null unique, secret_key varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.219+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table user_sessions (is_active boolean, created_at timestamp(6), expires_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, last_accessed_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, token varchar(2048) not null unique, device_fingerprint varchar(255), device_info varchar(255), ip_address varchar(255), location varchar(255), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.227+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table user_settings (auto_logout_minutes integer, read_only_mode boolean, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null unique, language varchar(10), theme varchar(20), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.231+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table users (email_verified boolean, failed_login_attempts integer, is_2fa_enabled boolean, lockout_count integer, created_at timestamp(6), deletion_requested_at timestamp(6), deletion_scheduled_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, locked_until timestamp(6), updated_at timestamp(6), password_hint varchar(500), duress_password_hash varchar(255), email varchar(255) not null unique, master_password_hash varchar(255) not null, name varchar(255), phone_number varchar(255), salt varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.235+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table vault_entries (is_deleted boolean, is_favorite boolean, is_highly_sensitive boolean, category_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), deleted_at timestamp(6), folder_id bigint, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, encrypted_password varchar(1000) not null, notes varchar(2000), account_name varchar(255) not null, username varchar(255) not null, website_url varchar(255), primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.238+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : create table vault_snapshots (changed_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, vault_entry_id bigint not null, password varchar(1000) not null, primary key (id)) 2026-03-06T04:44:05.240+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists audit_logs add constraint FKjs4iimve3y0xssbtve5ysyef0 foreign key (user_id) references users 2026-03-06T04:44:05.244+05:30 DEBUG 32332 --- [ main] org.hibernate.SQL : alter table if exists backup_codes add constraint FK160bkk8n4dor9g4ev8bg6kw5m foreign key (two_factor_auth_id) references
